title: Lore Craft
description:
Lore Craft is small mod that adds some swords, tools and boomerangs.
Also it adds some ores and other things.

JEI recommended

CLOSED
body:
# **If you are a giga chad playing Lore Craft or just stumbled on it I'm currently recreating the mod without MCreator so its probably going to be better. The mod is going to be probably completely open-source so if you'll want to mod my mod hehe its going to be as simple as it could be so yea get ready for new LoreCraft and bye**

**GECKOLIB REQUIRED!!!** VERSION 4.2.4 OF GECKOLIB RECCOMENDED

This is small mod that adds few things.

Lore Craft currently adds New Ores. Tools and weapons.
pretty cool mod :)

Update's are going to be probably every week.

[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) recommended!

if u want to get in contact with me here's my Discord : pandziarzdev

**I'm sorry there is no updates. But I think I'm gonna abandon this and create mod without MCreator so yea.**
